feedback.text: First I would like games to be transparent. If it is a game that works only online and it will be taken offline eventually, I want this to be clear at the moment of purchase. I am not buying the game I am buying access to a service that can be interrupted at any time. If i am buying a game I want to have access to that game even if the company is not supporting the game or is closed. I understand that some elements of the game do need maintenance or have cost associated with them and a company can't support this elements for eternity but I want them to have a plan for this case and when they stop support others could continue supporting it (fans, modders or other companies); or the game could go in a "museum" status where this elements are no longer active having just some place holders. For example if you have a race car game and the game needs a license for the use of the cars likeness. After the company will stop supporting they can change all the car skins to a no license skin. All I ask is for them to have a plan for stopping support that will allow us to play the game even after that moment.
